suzume Visual Regression Test

This page tests various CSS features for visual comparison with Firefox.

1. Box Model

This box has 20px padding, 2px border, and 300px width.

2. Colors

3. Flexbox

Item 1
Item 2
Item 3

4. Border Radius

5. Card Component

Card Title

This is a card with rounded corners and a subtle border.

It contains bold text, italic text, and links.

6. Lists

  • Unordered item 1
  • Unordered item 2
  • Unordered item 3
  1. Ordered item 1
  2. Ordered item 2
  3. Ordered item 3

7. Table

NameTypeValue
AlphaStringHello
BetaNumber42
GammaBooleantrue

8. Code

Inline code element in a paragraph.

fn main() void {
    std.debug.print("Hello from suzume!\n", .{});
}

9. Position

Absolute

10. Opacity

11. Text Styles

Underlined text

Strikethrough text

uppercase text

12. Overflow Hidden

This text is very long and should be clipped because the container has overflow hidden set. You should not see this part of the text at all.

13. Box Shadow

14. Inline Elements

This paragraph has bold, italic, code, and link inline elements mixed together in a single line of text.
